value.name: Full-day preschool program
value.useCase: Working families needing licensed early care

value.name: Montessori School Program
value.useCase: Early childhood education for preschool-age children founded on Montessori principles of hands-on learning and self-discovery

value.name: Summer Camp
value.useCase: Summer enrichment program; 2026 registration opens March 1st

value.name: Mini Skate Camp
value.useCase: One-day skateboarding camp for children ages 4–10, hosted on school campus in partnership with Connect Skateboarding

candidate.evidence: "Years 1, 2 and 3 are designed to help students reach multiple tiers of educational, social and emotional goals"; "Little Friends 2026 Summer Camp Registration is open March 1st"; "Mini Skate Camp is BACK...kids ages 4–10...Sunday, June 7th 9 AM – 12 PM"

existing.value: Low child-to-teacher ratios and a loft-based, play-led curriculum

candidate.value: Montessori-based multi-age learning environment with dedicated child-led spaces including a playground, garden, yoga studio, gymnasium, art room, and library
candidate.evidence: "We invite individually motivated experiences and practice exploration in our playground, garden, yoga studio, gymnasium, art room and library"

value.conditions: Ages 4 and up; open play in parking lot available for whole family at no stated charge

candidate.evidence: "Drop-off lessons are open to kids ages 4 and up for $30 per child. The 2-hour session is led by the incredible @connectskateboarding team and includes all equipment and professional instruction."
